variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list appears incomplete for SG&A. Chose the best overhead component rows from the full income statement preview: payroll, share-based compensation, other operating expenses, and sales/marketing. Manual review is needed because the statement contains duplicate row labels (e.g., 'Payroll and related expenses' and 'Other operating expenses' appear more than once), and final output cannot repeat the same exact row label, so coverage across all years may be imperfect. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Payroll and related expenses, [Income Statement] Share based compensation
